# stigmaR

The goal of stigmaR is to measure and calculate structural stigma.

#### 💬 Community & Support

Have questions, ideas, or need help?

[Join the discussion board
→](https://github.com/orgs/stigmaRverse/discussions)

## Installation

You can install the development version of stigmaR from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r

install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("follhim/stigmaR")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`composite`](https://follhim.github.io/stigmaR/reference/composite.md)
  : Composite Structural Stigma Indices
- [`cust_stigmaR()`](https://follhim.github.io/stigmaR/reference/cust_stigmaR.md)
  : Build a Custom Sum-Score Composite Index
- [`item_stigmaR()`](https://follhim.github.io/stigmaR/reference/item_stigmaR.md)
  : Calculate State-Level Individual Item Scores
- [`items`](https://follhim.github.io/stigmaR/reference/items.md) :
  Individual Item Structural Stigma Scores
- [`stigmaR()`](https://follhim.github.io/stigmaR/reference/stigmaR.md)
  : Calculate Structural Stigma Scores
